text.tspan: CUT HERE BEFORE PLAYING
WHERE TO GO [4/4]
easiest
hardest
or toss cards in air
for random choice.
Start in Room (the hotel lobby).
Choose a destination room with the
desired difficulty from the list below:
KEYCARD RULES [3/4]
You are only allowed to enter rooms
that these two keycards can open! To
check, place both keycards down on
the table with either card slightly
overlapping the other, so a 3-digit
room number shows along the top. If
you can't make the desired number,
you can't enter the room (e.g. 333).
There is a path between
any two rooms, but it may
not be obvious. If you get
stuck, draw yourself a map.
HOW TO PLAY [1/4]
Welcome to The Ephemera, a hotel
that lives only in your imagination.
The Ephemera is a solo puzzle game
where you navigate a maze that
appears like magic as you play.
Setup: Find paper and a pen. Choose
start and destination rooms (from [4]).
Gameplay: Write down room numbers,
each adjacent to the last, until you
reach your destination. Be sure to use
these keycards to open each room.
HOTEL LAYOUT [2/4]
The Ephemera's rooms are arranged
in a 4x4x4 cube. Each room has a 3-
digit room number indicating its
location. Rooms are considered
adjacent if two digits match and the
other digit is higher or lower by one.
For example:
